ogTitle: Barramunga vs Barraport West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Barramunga and Barraport West.
heading: Barramunga vs Barraport West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Barramunga, Victoria and Barraport West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Barramunga has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Barraport West (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Barramunga or Barraport West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Barramunga has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Barraport West scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Barramunga scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Barraport West scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Barramunga or Barraport West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Barramunga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
